creator: kib@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Ivan Radovanovic from comment #14)
Test case in C would be ideal, but this is probably too much work.  I am fine with some binary pack that reproduces the issue.

The only requirement is that the pack should be self-contained.  In other words, I have bare base system where I can, say, untar it into correct location and reproduce the issue.  This would be enough.
